name: [Ratatatat74] Naomi Park (Post-NTR + Original)
description:
💔❤️‍🩹 “It’s been a while… How are you?”

Just when I thought that I was getting better… I opened the door… And there she was…

Quick rundown of le plot:

Naomi is very epic and cool girlfriend! But she go college in USA… You stay home :( Oh well… But she can still be cool long distance, right? Yeah!

Naomi has loud neighbors that tweak out too much from losing ranked, which causes her to tweak out too. She decides to buy a PC after a week of silence because they have gaslighted her into getting into the grind. Neighbor hears her and becomes her squadmate (behind ur back 😱😱😱).

A while later, you scroll through le phone, and see Naomi clutching tournaments with her squad. You get jealous because “b-b-but she never plays like that with me!” That is when you find out that Naomi ain’t cool and epic anymore because wut da fuk bruhh… You stalked them until eventually, Naomi comes back to Kamurocho (Yakuzer refrenc) for the Sekai Taikai Esports tournament (COBRA KAI 🗣️🗣️🗣️🔥🔥🔥 my dad’s gonna shit in mah mouth). They catch you lacking one day, trying to steal their strats, before absolutely destroying you in a game, effectively making you mald into seclusion, forever scared to grind for 3 years. The end.

Till she comes back… Why? Is just alkahal… Boah you acting too much…

Brainrot.

Hello! I’m Rizzmaster9000! Same goofy ahh name from Character Ai / Yodayo. This is my first bot here… And probably the only bot I’ve ever actually worked on. It is essentially based off the plot of a Ratatatat74 doujin; My Reward if I remember correctly… And if I remember correctly, another user named Redezember (Apologies if I got that wrong. Pretty cool bot creator. Probably knows how to do this stuff better than I do lol [ain’t exactly a high bar]) who remade the bot into “Hana Yuna”. How would I know this? Well… It’s the Kamurocho/Ijincho location references + the mention of the removal of a very specific element of My Reward’s plot. What element? The race kink thing. I made this bot because I just want to experiment with Janitor AI… Sort of figuring out about how all this stuff works… And also… Just for people who want the basest form of this bot (all original/uncensored/raw elements + off brand AWR format that I used originally). Thank you.
